name: REGIONAL HEALTH PROPERTIES, INC
business: Regional Health Properties owns, operates, and invests in healthcare real estate and operating businesses focused on long-term care, senior housing, and pharmacy services. It generates revenue from patient care services at skilled nursing and senior housing facilities, pharmacy services including retail and institutional pharmacy and durable medical equipment, and leasing healthcare properties to third-party operators under triple-net leases.

exposures.sentence: Through its subsidiaries, Regional owns and operates skilled nursing and senior housing communities that provide a range of healthcare and residential services, including sub-acute and post-acute skilled nursing care, intermediate nursing care, rehabilitative therapy, memory care, Alzheimer's and dementia care and senior living services.

As part of the SunLink merger, Regional also acquired a pharmacy business located in Crowley, Louisiana that provides retail pharmacy services, institutional pharmacy services and durable medical equipment.
